# REQ-QR-260001: MVP Graph Interaction Performance Baseline

- Class: QR
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-04-17
- Source decision: D6 (Performance target)

## Requirement

The MVP workspace shall support approximately 300-500 atoms and 600-1000 bonds per workspace while maintaining perceived interactive response under 100 ms for common graph interactions, and typical initial graph render after bootstrap search under 2 seconds.

## Rationale

Explicit quantitative performance targets are required to make visualization and interaction quality testable before release.

## Scope Notes

- In scope for MVP: representative dataset and latency targets for core graph interactions and initial render.
- Out of scope for this requirement: enterprise-scale graph volume targets and full mobile performance baselines.

## Verification

- Performance tests confirm interaction latency target under representative workloads.
- Performance tests confirm initial graph render target after bootstrap search for typical datasets.
- Release checks confirm performance regressions above thresholds block MVP acceptance.

## Traceability

- Related ADRs: ADR-260015
- Related backlog items: BI-260012
